title: sterculia elmeri
intro: Sterculia elmeri, also known as the Elmer's sterculia or wild jack, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The extracts of Sterculia elmeri have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits.
